my bank blance is - 3991, now i want to purchesd a product which cost 750 & onther product cost 600 but i want to save money 3000 rs.. but how its possible ?

If your bank balance is currently -3991 and you want to purchase products amounting to 750 and 600, while also saving 3000 rupees, it is not possible to do so with your current balance.

To save 3000 rupees, you would need a positive balance of at least 3000 rupees. In this case, you would need to either increase your balance or adjust your purchases to fit within your current balance.

Here are a few options you could consider:

1. Delay the purchase of the products until you have saved enough money to cover the cost.

2. Look for alternative, less expensive products that fit within your current balance.

3. Consider borrowing money or seeking financial assistance from friends or family to help with the purchase.

Remember to prioritize your financial stability and make decisions that align with your budget and financial goals.
